_rationale: code_insight mode=git_analyze is the git-flavoured branch. Multi-lang corpus has no git history so both binaries emit the empty-statistics fallback (complexity/coupling/cohesion/quality all 0.00). After iter-5 fix, C++ emits a byte-identical 302-byte LCF payload to Go: same mode=git_analyze header, same STATISTICS section with zero values. Probe: /tmp/parity-iter4/code_insight___mode___git_analyze.{go,cpp}.json both 302 bytes after rebuild. Locks the git-mode dispatch branch even though the corpus exercises the empty-history path; sufficient to detect any regression that re-routes git_analyze back to overview.

tiers._rationale_stable: Envelope matches MCP spec. result.content[].text is byte-for-byte identical on multi-lang corpus's empty-git-history fallback. A future descriptor on a git-populated corpus would lock real git_analyze content; this one specifically locks the dispatch + empty-fallback path.
